nasb.text: Yet all of this does not satisfy me every time I see Mordecai the Jew sitting at the king’s gate.”

esv.text: Yet all this is worth nothing to me, so long as I see Mordecai the Jew sitting at the king’s gate.”

cnv.text: 只是每逢我看見坐在朝門那裡的猶大人末底改的時候，這一切對我都沒有多大的意思。”

ccb.text: 但只要我看见犹太人末底改坐在宫门口，这一切对我都毫无意义。”
